title: salacia multiflora subsp. multiflora
intro: Salacia multiflora subsp. multiflora, also known as Kokilaksha or Bitter Caltrops, is a plant species that belongs to the family Capparaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Salacia multiflora subsp. multiflora include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol levels, and aid in weight management, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against oxidative stress. Salacia multiflora subsp. multiflora is commonly prepared in herbal form through extracts and powders, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and other supplements.
